title: MissionSpec Backend Input Schema
description: Backend-neutral astrodynamics mission input schema. Visualization entries in this schema request data prerequisites for the visualization layer; rendered visualization products are generated separately.

parameter_name.description: GMAT-style parameter name or neutral parameter path, e.g. Sat.EarthMJ2000Eq.X or spacecraft.state.cartesian.x.

name.description: Orekit ParameterDriver / GMAT solve-for parameter name.

selected.description: True when used as a solve-for/estimated/varied parameter.

synchronized.description: GMAT Propagate Synchronized behavior for multi-spacecraft propagation.

schema_version.description: MissionSpec schema version, not backend version.

origin.description: GMAT CoordinateSystem.Origin / Orekit Frame origin context.

axes.description: GMAT CoordinateSystem.Axes or neutral/Orekit frame orientation identifier.

epoch.description: GMAT Epoch / Orekit AbsoluteDate serialized using conventions.epoch_format and conventions.time_scale unless overridden.

reference_frame.description: GMAT CoordinateSystem / Orekit Frame for the initial state.

attitude_provider.description: Orekit AttitudeProvider or GMAT attitude mode identifier.

spacecraft_model.description: Orekit spacecraft surface model / GMAT spacecraft physical model reference.

point_masses.description: GMAT PointMasses / Orekit third-body attraction bodies.

relativity.description: Orekit relativity force model / GMAT relativistic correction settings.

orbit_type.description: Orekit orbit type/state parameterization for propagation.

mission_sequence.description: GMAT BeginMissionSequence equivalent. Orekit requires adapter-level orchestration over propagators, event detectors, maneuvers, and solvers.

targeting.description: GMAT Target/Vary/Achieve/Optimize or adapter-level solver configuration. Kept open for solver-specific controls.

estimation.description: Orekit orbit determination / covariance propagation / GMAT OD-style settings.

coordinate_system.description: GMAT ReportFile/EphemerisFile coordinate system when a CoordinateSystem name is required.

data_prerequisites.description: Hints for compiler-produced data products needed by the visualization layer.
